productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men Black Innerwear T-Shirt
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton fabric, this vest from the brand embodies these very ideals and can be worn as loungewear, innerwear or sportswear. Its moulded armholes ensure total flexibility and freedom of movement while printed branding gives abraision free comfort. Product DetailsBlack muscle-vest, round-neck, sleeveless, white piping at front, red taping at shoulder, moulded armholes for flexibility, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritationMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' shoulders18& rdquo ) is wearing a size L
